privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introduction: At Harlock, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use the Arcadia Hub partner portal.

dataCollection.title: Information We Collect
dataCollection.description: We collect information that you provide directly to us, including:
dataCollection.item1: Personal identification information (name, email address, phone number)
dataCollection.item2: Company information (company name, address, business details)
dataCollection.item4: Usage data and interaction with our platform

dataUsage.title: How We Use Your Information
dataUsage.description: We use the information we collect to:
dataUsage.item1: Provide, maintain, and improve our services
dataUsage.item2: Process transactions and send related information
dataUsage.item4: Respond to your comments, questions, and support requests

dataProtection.title: Data Protection
dataProtection.description: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. Your data is stored on secure servers and encrypted during transmission.

cookies.title: Cookies and Tracking
cookies.description: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity on our platform and hold certain information. Cookies are files with small amounts of data which may include an anonymous unique identifier. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent.

thirdParties.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParties.description: We may share your information with third-party service providers who perform services on our behalf, such as hosting, data analysis, and customer service. These third parties are obligated to protect your information and may only use it for the purposes for which it was disclosed.

userRights.title: Your Rights
userRights.description: Under applicable data protection laws, you have the following rights:
userRights.item1: Right to access your personal data
userRights.item2: Right to rectification of inaccurate data
userRights.item3: Right to erasure of your data

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.introduction: Welcome to Arcadia Hub, the partner portal operated by Harlock. These Terms of Service govern your access to and use of our platform. By accessing or using Arcadia Hub, you agree to be bound by these terms.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.description: By accessing or using Arcadia Hub, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, you may not access or use the platform.

eligibility.title: Eligibility
eligibility.description: Arcadia Hub is intended for authorized Harlock partners only. To use the platform, you must be an authorized representative of a company that has entered into a partnership agreement with Harlock. You must be at least 18 years old to use this service.

account.title: Account Responsibilities
account.description: When you create an account on Arcadia Hub, you agree to:
account.item1: Provide accurate, current, and complete information
account.item2: Maintain the security of your account credentials
account.item3: Notify us immediately of any unauthorized access to your account

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable Use
acceptableUse.description: You agree not to use Arcadia Hub to:
acceptableUse.item1: Violate any applicable laws or regulations
acceptableUse.item2: Infringe upon the rights of others
acceptableUse.item3: Transmit any harmful or malicious content
acceptableUse.item4: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.description: All content, features, and functionality of Arcadia Hub, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, and software, are owned by Harlock and are protected by intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our express written permission.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.description: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Harlock shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of or inability to use the platform. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by you, if any, for accessing the platform.

termination.title: Termination
termination.description: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to Arcadia Hub at any time, with or without cause, and with or without notice. Upon termination, your right to use the platform will immediately cease.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.description: We may modify these Terms of Service at any time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new terms on this page and updating the "Last Updated" date. Your continued use of the platform after such changes constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.

governingLaw.title: Governing Law
governingLaw.description: These Terms of Service shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Italy. Any disputes arising from these terms or your use of the platform shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Italy.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.noNotificationsYet: Notifications will appear here when there's activity on your account.
